title: How to convert an item into subitem while keeping the original itemID via api

posts.author: mtix99 (Miklos Tix)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,
I’m looking for a solution how to convert an item into subitem without changing the original itemID.
I need this because we have a Jira-Monday integration that cannot handle subitems so I would sync jira issues under epics as items and if they have a parent epic link, I would convert them into subitems under the respective item.
I know that on the UI you can convert them but I didn’t find a way to do it via api, just found only the new subitem creation method but that doesn’t work for me as I need to keep the original itemID.

Thank you in advance!

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Now checking here https://monday.slack.com/archives/C01141M8AAC/p1712755373910659
(they are giving walking me from channel to channel).

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @mtix99 and welcome to the community!

I replied to the ticket you opened

posts.author: mtix99 (Miklos Tix)
posts.cookedHtml: Thanks so much @Matias.Monday!

posts.author: Daniel.prudente (DP)
posts.cookedHtml: It would be great to know the answer for this. I also have the same issue.

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @Daniel.prudente,

As of today, there is no way to turn an item into a subitem via API so that it can maintain the same ID.

Let me know if you have any other questions!

Cheers,
Matias
